# Improvement Evaluation Template

candidate_id:
source_artifacts:
metric:
baseline:
observed_metric_evidence:
comparison_to_baseline:
result:
decision:
policy_change:
decision_criteria_comparison:
reevaluation_window:
proxy_risk_disposition:
rationale:
routing_action:

## Notes

Use this template for Stage 7 improvement evaluations. Policy-changing
Workflow Trial decisions must compare evidence to the predeclared criteria,
record the later re-evaluation window, and disposition proxy-risk or
reward-hacking side effects before keep, revise, revert, or double_down can
change workflow policy.
